title: Mayora Indah’s net profit soared 40.92% in the first half
body: PT Mayora Indah Tbk (MYOR) booked net profit of IDR 1.71 trillion in the first half (H1) of 2024, up 40.92% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Bukaka Teknik Utama to establish a joint venture, investing IDR 7 billion
body: PT Bukaka Teknik Utama Tbk (BUKK), a construction and manufacturing company, has partnered with PT Bangun Daya Utama (BDU) to establish two new joint ventures.

title: Tigaraksa Satria divests portion in Gramedia Digital Nusantara
body: PT Tigaraksa Satria Tbk (TGKA) has divested the entire portion of its shares in PT Gramedia Digital Nusantara (GDN) to PT Digital Intisari Nusantara (DIN).

title: Investors’ interest in state sukuks keeps declining
body: The total incoming bids recorded in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or state sukuk last Tuesday (13/8) reached IDR 17.97 trillion.

title: 249 million Energi Mega Persada (ENRG) shares released by Shima Global
body: PT Shima Global Kapital released 249 million shares of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG) on Monday, August 12. Prior to selling these shares, the investor owned about 22.09% of the shares of this oil and gas trading and exploration issuer, but now only 21.09% is left. This transaction was made possible by PT KB Valbury Sekuritas and PT OCBC Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: Mayora Indah’s net profit soared 40.92% in the first half
body: PT Mayora Indah Tbk (MYOR) booked net profit of IDR 1.71 trillion in the first half (H1) of 2024, up 40.92% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period last year.

title: Bukaka Teknik Utama to establish a joint venture, investing IDR 7 billion
body: PT Bukaka Teknik Utama Tbk (BUKK), a construction and manufacturing company, has partnered with PT Bangun Daya Utama (BDU) to establish two new joint ventures.

title: Tigaraksa Satria divests portion in Gramedia Digital Nusantara
body: PT Tigaraksa Satria Tbk (TGKA) has divested the entire portion of its shares in PT Gramedia Digital Nusantara (GDN) to PT Digital Intisari Nusantara (DIN).

title: Investors’ interest in state sukuks keeps declining
body: The total incoming bids recorded in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or state sukuk last Tuesday (13/8) reached IDR 17.97 trillion.

title: 249 million Energi Mega Persada (ENRG) shares released by Shima Global
body: PT Shima Global Kapital released 249 million shares of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG) on Monday, August 12. Prior to selling these shares, the investor owned about 22.09% of the shares of this oil and gas trading and exploration issuer, but now only 21.09% is left. This transaction was made possible by PT KB Valbury Sekuritas and PT OCBC Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: Foreign investors buy up Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares, net foreign volume surplus at 441.21 million shares
body: On Monday, August 12, foreign investors purchased 1.42 billion shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), for a net volume of 79.06 million shares. Through this transaction, foreign purchase volume jumped to 3 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume totaled 2.56 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 441.21 million shares.

title: JCI saw continuous uptrend throughout the day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) throughout Tuesday (13/8) shifted positively, picking up the positive trend shown yesterday’s (12/8) afternoon.

title: Enhancing efficiency, MTMH to acquire suppliers of laboratory and pharmaceutical equipment
body: PT Murni Sadar Tbk (MTMH), the managing company of Murni Teguh Hospital, has acquired PT Gamaliel Elia Tua (GET), a company engaged in the wholesale of laboratory and pharmaceutical equipment.

title: CMNP obtains financing facility of IDR 4 trillion from SMI
body: PT Citra Marga Nusaphala Persada Tbk (CMNP), a toll road company, has acquired a sharia financing facility from PT Sarana Multi Infrastruktur (Persero).

title: SGER’s profit shrank 21.73%
body: The net profit of PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk (SGER) was seen declining 21.73% year-on-year (yoy) in the first half (H1) of 2024 despite its 24.36% yoy growth in revenue.

title: MLPT to allocate interim dividend of IDR 206.25 billion
body: PT Multipolar Technology Tbk (MLPT) will distribute interim dividend for the fiscal year 2024 of IDR 206.25 billion.

title: Bank Ina to join hands with Bahana Artha Ventura for MSME financing
body: PT Bank Ina Perdana Tbk (BINA) has officially formed a strategic partnership with PT Bahana Artha Ventura (BAV) in order to support the expansion of Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs).

title: PPGL to distribute interim dividend of IDR 4.54 per share
body: PT Prima Globalindo Logistik Tbk (PPGL), a freight-forwarding company, plans to allocate interim dividend of IDR 3.5 billion or IDR 4.54 per share.

title: A year debuting, these 4 stocks plummeted
body: Stock performances of four issuers were reportedly plummeting after a year making their ways in the stock exchange, ranging from August 8 to 10, 2023.

title: Gaining back profitability, BLTZ scored IDR 9.87 billion of profit in the first half
body: PT Graha Layar Prima Tbk (BLTZ), the managing company of CGV theatre network in Indonesia, booked net profit of IDR 9.87 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: SRIL to place 50% assets as collateral to creditor
body: PT Sri Rejeki Isman Tbk (SRIL) will place over 50% of its total assets and equity as a security to creditors in regard to the homologated decision of peace agreement ordered by the Commercial Court of Semarang, Central Java.

title: Sarana Multigriya Finansial to issue bond and sukuk of IDR 1.69 trillion
body: PT Sarana Multigriya Finansial (Persero) or SMF, a state-owned company engaged in secondary financing for housing ownership, will issue Shelf-Registration Bond VII of SMF Phase VI Year 2024 and Shelf-Registration Sukuk Musyarakah I Phase III Year 2024.

title: Foreign buy recorded double of foreign sell; net foreign volume closed at 967.51 million shares
body: On Friday, August 9, foreign investors were seen making share purchases, totaling 2.01 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was only 1.04 billion shares. The difference between the two brought net foreign volume to 967.51 million shares. PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) shares returned to first place on the top buy list, unchanged from the previous day, with 385.98 million shares purchased and a net volume of 370.97 million shares.

title: Barito Pacific sells off over 10 billion Chandra Asri (TPIA) shares
body: On Thursday, August 8, PT Barito Pacific Tbk, the owner of 31.58% of PT Chandra Asri Pacific (TPIA) shares, released shares in outstanding volume. Barito Pacific released more than 10.13 billion shares of this petrochemical manufacturing and processing company through PT Harita Kencana Sekuritas, reducing its share portion to just 19.87%.

title: Released 15 million Estee Gold Feet (EURO) shares, Firstindo now only holds 7.81%
body: PT. Firstindo Finansial Corpora has been observed releasing shares of PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO), an aerosol company for cosmetics and home appliances, lately. This investor released an additional 15.35 million shares on Wednesday, August 7, meaning that only 198.95 million shares, or roughly 7.81%, were held.

title: Samudera Prawirawidjaja acquires 40% Campina (CAMP) shares from Sabana Prawira Widjaja
body: Samudera Prawirawidjaja acquired up to 2.35 billion shares of PT Campina Ice Cream Industry Tbk (CAMP) on Tuesday, August 6, from its controller, Sabana Prawira Widjaja. Immediately, this new investor acquired 40% of CAMP, while Sabana's share percentage decreased from 82.94% to 43.94%. PT Shinhan Sekuritas Indonesia facilitated both transactions.

title: JCI recovers near closing bell
body: Jakarta Stock Index Composite (JCI) has recovered at the end of today’s (12/8) trading session.

title: Wismilak Inti Makmur’s net profit slipped 40%
body: PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk (WIIM), a cigarette manufacturer with the third highest market capitalisation in Indonesia, reported net profit of IDR 147.24 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: INTP profit declines 37.75% in first half
body: Even though PT Indocement Tunggal Perkasa Tbk (INTP)'s revenue grew 2%, this issuer's profit performance fell 37.75% in the first semester of 2024 from the same period last year.

title: AGII’s profit reached IDR 65.83 billion in the first half
body: The net profit of PT Samator Indo Gas Tbk (AGII) slowed down in the first half of 2024, although the revenue grew 3.81% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period in 2023.

title: A year debuting, two stocks saw downturns, another two skyrocketed
body: The stock prices of two issuers out of four that debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange last year (8/8) report a decline, contrasting with another two that sport over 50% growth.

title: Harum Energy to ready IDR 1 trillion for buyback
body: PT Harum Energy Tbk (HRUM), a coal and nickel mining company, will conduct a buyback, setting the budget to IDR 1 trillion.

title: Foreign buy hits 2 billion shares, net foreign volume surplus at 264.64 million shares
body: Share buying activity by foreign investors on Thursday, August 8, resulted in a foreign buying volume reaching 2 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume totaled 1.74 billion shares. As a result, the net foreign surplus totaled approximately 264.64 million shares. The most shares bought up belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), namely 512.93 million shares, which yielded a net volume of 58.34 million shares.

title: Indika Energi’s subsidiary to establish new subsidiary, investing IDR 6.25 billion
body: PT Indika Energi Tbk (INDY), through two of its subsidiaries, PT Kalista Soter Hastia (KSH) and PT Kalista Nusa Armada (KNA), will form a new subsidiary with total investment worth IDR 6.25 billion.

title: Wira Global Solusi’s net profit got corrected 33.8% in H1 2024
body: PT Wira Global Solusi Tbk (WIRG), an IT solution provider for small-medium enterprises, booked net profit of IDR 1.96 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Iforte secures loan of JPY 14 billion
body: A subsidiary of PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) obtains a credit facility worth JPY 14 billion from PT Bank Mizuho Indonesia.

title: ISAT plans a stock split of 1:4 ratio
body: PT Indosat Tbk (ISAT) will split the stock value (stock split) with a ratio of 1:4, meaning that one old share will be split into 4 new shares with updated value.

title: Shifting to green zone, net foreign volume closed at 354.80 million shares
body: On Wednesday, August 7, foreign investors increased their share purchases, totaling 1.97 billion shares. The foreign selling volume was 1.62 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume into the green zone and closing at 354.80 million shares. The share purchase transactions then began with the purchase of 141.66 million shares of the energy resources infrastructure company PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), with a net volume of 115.92 million shares.

title: KNEKS appointed 90 Sharia Pioneer Schools
body: The National Committee for Sharia Economics (KNEKS) once again designated 46 State High Schools/Vocational Schools in DI Yogyakarta as pioneer schools for sharia economics.

title: Ending the week on a high note, JCI saw an uptrend
body: Throughout the session today (9/8), Jakarta Stock Composite Index (JCI) reportedly climbed to 7,250, close to the rebound level of 7,300 as seen last Friday (2/8).
